operations.name: Ready-for-Dev Executor
operations.description: Implements approved ready-for-dev issues using a two-step codex planner/executor flow with label-constrained model/thinking routing.

args.name: issue
args.description: Optional issue number to restrict planner candidates to a specific ready-for-dev issue.

args.name: dry-run
args.description: Resolve and print routing without launching codex.

args.name: model
args.description: Optional override model for this run.

args.name: thinking
args.description: Optional override reasoning effort: low|medium|high|xhigh.

operations.name: Issue Evaluator
operations.description: Evaluates open issues and applies ready-for-dev, human-eval-needed, or rejected decisions.

args.name: dry-run
args.description: Print launch command without executing codex.

args.name: model
args.description: Optional override model for this run.

args.name: thinking
args.description: Optional override reasoning effort: low|medium|high|xhigh.

args.name: thinking
args.description: Optional override reasoning effort: low|medium|high|xhigh.
